key_events: KOSPI surged 5.49% on April 1, 2026, amid optimism for Middle East conflict de-escalation.
Korea Exchange (KRX) activated a sidecar due to the sharp index rise.
Strategic petroleum reserve swap program initiated to stabilize supply.
